title: 3 High-Yield Healthcare Stocks to Boost Your Passive Income Stream
text: Medical Properties Trust is one of the world's largest hospital owners and it offers a huge 11% yield right now. There's a good chance the last medical specialist you visited was in a building owned by Physicians Realty Trust, a medical REIT that offers a 6% yield right now.

title: Physicians Realty Trust Celebrates 10 Years in Business on July 19, 2023
text: MILWAUKEE--(BUSINESS WIRE)--On July 19, 2023, Physicians Realty Trust (the “Company”) (NYSE: DOC) proudly marks a momentous milestone as it celebrates the 10th anniversary of its Initial Public Offering (IPO) on the New York Stock Exchange on July 19, 2013. “Founded with a vision to transform the health care real estate landscape, the Company has consistently demonstrated resilience, adaptability, and a commitment to excellence,” said John T. Thomas, the Company's President & Chief Executiv.

title: RTG Partners with Northside Hospital and Physicians Realty Trust on 100,000 SF Gwinnett Medical Office Building
text: ATLANTA , July 11, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Representatives from Realty Trust Group (RTG), Northside Hospital, and Physicians Realty Trust (NYSE: DOC) joined on June 26 to celebrate groundbreaking for a new 100,000-square-foot medical office building in the north Gwinnett community near Atlanta, GA. Northside Hospital will lease the majority of the new building and plans to provide a range of specialized healthcare services to meet the diverse needs of the growing community, including primary care, family medicine, medical oncology, imaging services, cardiology, orthopedics, physical therapy, a surgery center focusing on total joint replacement, and third-party physician office space.

title: Want $6,000 in Annual Dividend Income? Invest $64,200 in These 3 High-Yield Stocks.
text: Physicians Realty Trust is a real estate investment trust that owns heaps of medical office buildings. Medical Properties Trust collects rent from dozens of businesses that operate its enormous portfolio of hospitals and related healthcare facilities.

title: Dividend Powerhouses: 7 Stocks to Outrun Inflation and Grow Your Wealth
text: I'm willing to bet every reader of this article is sick and tired of inflation, which, although falling, remains above 4%. It has hurt stock portfolios, the economy overall, and seems to exact its toll everywhere you go.

title: Will REITs Stand Up To A Recession? Brad Thomas With Kirk Spano
text: Real estate expert Brad Thomas discusses the potential of a recession and how real estate investment trusts (REITs) can be used as insulation and income generation during such a period. He advises avoiding the hotel sector and limiting exposure to retail, while recommending investment in net lease, industrial, cell towers, and data centers.
